description: Records identified through database searching (PubMed + PsycINFO + Web of Science + Scopus + Cochrane Central; combined)
Records identified through other sources (forward/backward citation tracking from anchor papers)
Records excluded at title/abstract (per-paper reasons not preserved)
Full-text articles excluded (total across the 6 reasons below)
Did not manipulate affect labeling per PROSPERO section 11
No physiological or neural outcome measured
Literature review or commentary without primary empirical data
Non-English with no translated full text
Duplicate sample of an already-included study
Insufficient data to extract or compute Hedges g
Total included in qualitative and quantitative synthesis
Existing coordinate-based and other meta-analyses (synthesized narratively)
